outlook.volatilityExpectation: HIGH - Negative GEX regime amplifies all price movements
outlook.summary: Market trapped in short gamma regime across all expiries (Total GEX: -10.46B combined). Dealers will amplify any directional move. Extreme PCR (1.54-5.27) and persistent smirk skew indicate heavy fear-based hedging. Max Pain at 685 acts as magnetic target above spot. Critical risk: if 670 RESONANCE support breaks, expect accelerated downside.

Dealers will defend 605-600 zone; upside capped at 617-620.
